<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="512" height="512" viewBox="0 0 512 512">
  <defs>
    <radialGradient id="gKiwi" cx="45%" cy="35%" r="65%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#9ef06a"/>
      <stop offset="55%" stop-color="#2fb84f"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#0f7f35"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="gSeeds" cx="45%" cy="40%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#ffe7a8"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#d2a35c"/>
    </radialGradient>
    <radialGradient id="gSkin" cx="35%" cy="30%" r="70%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#6b4c2f"/>
      <stop offset="55%" stop-color="#3b2718"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#1f140d"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>

  <!-- whole kiwi -->
  <g transform="translate(95,55)">
    <ellipse cx="170" cy="210" rx="135" ry="160" fill="url(#gSkin)"/>
    <!-- fuzzy dots -->
    <g fill="#6f5a46" opacity="0.75">
      <circle cx="60" cy="190" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="90" cy="120" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="135" cy="75" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="190" cy="55" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="250" cy="75" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="285" cy="135" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="300" cy="210" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="275" cy="280" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="210" cy="330" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="145" cy="325" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="95" cy="275" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="70" cy="235" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="120" cy="220" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="160" cy="160" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="210" cy="160" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="245" cy="215" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="215" cy="265" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="160" cy="270" r="5"/>
      <circle cx="120" cy="260" r="4"/>
      <circle cx="150" cy="205" r="5"/>
    </g>
    <ellipse cx="170" cy="210" rx="120" ry="145" fill="none" stroke="#2c1c10" stroke-width="6" opacity="0.35"/>
  </g>

  <!-- kiwi slice -->
  <g transform="translate(235,225) rotate(-18)">
    <!-- outer rim -->
    <path d="M -130 -40 C -115 -95, -45 -145, 15 -150 C 70 -155, 125 -115, 135 -60 C 145 -5, 110 55, 60 95 C 15 130, -50 130, -95 95 C -140 60, -145 5, -130 -40 Z" fill="url(#gSkin)"/>

    <!-- green flesh -->
    <path d="M -105 -30 C -95 -70, -40 -108, 10 -112 C 55 -116, 105 -90, 112 -55 C 119 -20, 92 30, 55 62 C 20 93, -32 98, -67 72 C -105 45, -112 5, -105 -30 Z" fill="url(#gKiwi)"/>

    <!-- seed ring -->
    <g>
      <!-- lighter inner area -->
      <path d="M -70 -5 C -60 -40, -20 -68, 18 -70 C 55 -72, 90 -55, 97 -25 C 104 5, 82 40, 52 60 C 20 82, -20 82, -45 62 C -75 38, -80 10, -70 -5 Z" fill="#37cf5a" opacity="0.9"/>

      <!-- seeds (no text) -->
      <g fill="url(#gSeeds)" stroke="#9a6b2f" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.95">
        <ellipse cx="-35" cy="-5" rx="9" ry="12"/>
        <ellipse cx="-15" cy="-20" rx="8" ry="11"/>
        <ellipse cx="5" cy="-30" rx="9" ry="12"/>
        <ellipse cx="25" cy="-18" rx="8" ry="11"/>
        <ellipse cx="40" cy="0" rx="9" ry="12"/>
        <ellipse cx="20" cy="18" rx="8" ry="11"/>
        <ellipse cx="0" cy="28" rx="9" ry="12"/>
        <ellipse cx="-22" cy="20" rx="8" ry="11"/>

        <ellipse cx="-55" cy="10" rx="7" ry="10"/>
        <ellipse cx="-30" cy="35" rx="7" ry="10"/>
        <ellipse cx="12" cy="40" rx="7" ry="10"/>
        <ellipse cx="52" cy="18" rx="7" ry="10"/>
        <ellipse cx="60" cy="-12" rx="7" ry="10"/>
        <ellipse cx="30" cy="-42" rx="7" ry="10"/>
        <ellipse cx="-5" cy="-45" rx="7" ry="10"/>
        <ellipse cx="-45" cy="-25" rx="7" ry="10"/>
      </g>

      <!-- central seed highlights -->
      <g fill="#ffeecb" opacity="0.55">
        <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="26"/>
      </g>
    </g>

    <!-- radial texture lines -->
    <g opacity="0.22" stroke="#e7ffd6" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round">
      <path d="M -45 55 C -25 45, -10 25, 10 5" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M -10 70 C 5 55, 15 35, 30 15" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M -70 20 C -45 10, -25 -5, 0 -20" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M -20 -70 C -5 -55, 10 -35, 25 -15" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M 30 -65 C 45 -50, 55 -30, 70 -5" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M 65 -5 C 48 10, 35 25, 18 45" fill="none"/>
    </g>
  </g>

  <!-- subtle shadow -->
  <ellipse cx="210" cy="420" rx="190" ry="35" fill="#000" opacity="0.07"/>
</svg>

messages.content:
You are a drawing agent in a one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: svg.

Rules:
1) Draw the target word using only SVG graphics.
2) Output one complete <svg>...</svg> string.
3) Do not include text labels, letters, or numbers in the drawing.
4) Keep the SVG simple and valid. No scripts, no foreignObject.
5) Use a 512x512 canvas.

Output schema:
{ "svg": "string" }

message.reasoning:
**Creating kiwi illustration**

I need to generate an image of a kiwi fruit, either showing the whole fruit or a cross-section. I'll aim for a simple vector style, depicting an oval green fruit with a brown skin and maybe a slice to showcase the inside. It's important to keep it entirely text-free, so there shouldn't be any letters or words in the design. I’ll focus on producing just the SVG file with the kiwi illustration.

messages.content:
You are the guesser in a visual one-word guessing game.
Return JSON only, with a single field: guesses.

Rules:
1) You receive one JPEG image of a drawing.
2) Return exactly 20 one-word guesses in order of confidence (best guess first).
3) The order is important and will be scored by first correct position.
4) Do not repeat guesses.
5) Each guess must be EN-US one word, no spaces.
6) Avoid punctuation and numbers.

Output schema:
{ "guesses": ["string", "... exactly 20 items ..."] }

content.text: {"language":"EN-US","maxHints":20,"note":"Return 20 ordered guesses. Position 1 is the highest-confidence guess."}
